title: Traditional banks — check iDEAL and SEPA support
intro: Neutral listings for ING, ABN AMRO, and Rabobank. Compare iDEAL, direct debit, and fee pages on each bank’s official site — not a ranking.

items.reason: Retail bank — confirm iDEAL access, betaalverzoek, and incasso setup on ING’s current product pages.
Full-service bank — useful when employers or landlords expect familiar Dutch IBAN patterns; verify app features on ABN AMRO’s site.
Cooperative retail bank — compare English help and payment tools for your region on Rabobank’s disclosures.

disclosure: Some links may be affiliate or referral links. If you use them, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Ordering reflects page relevance, not pay-to-rank placement. Always confirm scope, pricing, and terms with the provider directly.
